body.title: Memory payload field + schema validation
body.result: Memory.payload Optional[Dict] field added to models.py + embedding_text property (payload.NARRATIVE fallback). MEM_COLS updated in db_proxy.py. INSERT + _to_memory updated in cortex.py. DB migration: ALTER TABLE memories ADD COLUMN payload TEXT. 555 tests passing.
body.description: Add payload JSONB field to Memory model. Embedder reads payload.NARRATIVE if present, falls back to top-level narrative. Triggers dict (string->cell_name), payload dict (cell_name->instruction_list, NARRATIVE, data_fields). Legacy nodes unaffected. MEDIUM inertia (models.py).
